what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record of type 'board_items' that associates attachment att-858c2606 with the board item item-11e84d01 in the dragnet-development channel, recording when the association was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Its target is a board:// URI pointing to item-11e84d01.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a target board item.
Acts as a minimal join/association record between an attachment and a board item.
conventions: Follows the YAML frontmatter metadata convention with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset.
notes: A thin, timestamped link record connecting a channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or payload does this attachment actually hold?
What is the precise semantic relationship intended between the attachment and the board item (e.g., evidence, comment, snapshot)?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a board_items attachment targeting a board item matches what the file does: it records an association to a board item.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channel artifacts and board items.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, retrievable link from a channel attachment to a board item so the attachment can be found in the context of that item.
contribution: Provides a timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting navigation and context retrieval without embedding the payload itself.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment record linking attachment att-858c2606 to board item item-11e84d01 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item for later lookup and traceability.
